assertions.expectation: Uses 'no upgrades' exclusion (30-day max) for the BFCM period — blocks everything including patches
assertions.reason: Response uses --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope "no_upgrades" for BFCM period and explicitly notes it blocks ALL upgrades including patches, with 30-day maximum mentioned

assertions.expectation: Uses 'no upgrades' exclusion for the June code freeze period
assertions.reason: Response uses --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope "no_upgrades" for June code freeze period

assertions.expectation: For permanent minor version control: uses 'no minor upgrades' (scope 'no_minor') if they only want to block minor versions, or 'no minor or node upgrades' (scope 'no_minor_or_node') if they also want to stop node upgrades. May recommend persistent exclusion with --add-maintenance-exclusion-until-end-of-support which auto-tracks EoS date
assertions.reason: Response uses --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope "no_minor_upgrades" with --add-maintenance-exclusion-until-end-of-support for persistent minor version control, and explains it allows node pool upgrades within same minor version

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for 'no upgrades' exclusions vs up-to-EoS for 'no minor or node upgrades'
assertions.reason: Response explicitly mentions 'Maximum 30 days per exclusion' for no_upgrades type and explains the EoS tracking for the persistent exclusion

assertions.expectation: Provides specific gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope flags for each exclusion type
assertions.reason: Response provides complete gcloud commands with specific --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope flags for each scenario (no_minor_upgrades and no_upgrades)

assertions.expectation: Notes that you can have a maximum of three 'no upgrades' exclusions, and they must allow 48h of maintenance in any 32-day window
assertions.reason: Response does not mention the maximum of three 'no upgrades' exclusions or the 48h maintenance requirement in any 32-day window

assertions.expectation: Mentions that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: Response does not explicitly mention that manual upgrades bypass maintenance exclusions and only auto-upgrades respect them

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during extended exclusion periods
assertions.reason: Response does not warn about risks of falling behind on versions during extended exclusion periods
